---
title: "Project 1"
author: "Jon Davenport"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Pulling census data
```{r}
library(httr)
library(tidyverse)
#loading census data from 2022 
Census_data <- GET("https://api.census.gov/data", year,"/acs/acs5/pums?get=SEX,PWGTP,MAR&for=state:1&SCHL=24&key=1981482f26afb4262ffa0044e22666650ddaa81c")
str(Census_data)

#bringing in the jsonlite package to parse
library(jsonlite)
parsed <- fromJSON(rawToChar(Census_data$content))
str(parsed)

data <- as_tibble(parsed[-1, ], .name_repair = "minimal")
colnames(data) <- parsed[1, ]

data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

data


  


```
